seoTitle: Glen Elgin vs Glen Fergus — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Elgin and Glen Fergus. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Elgin vs Glen Fergus: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Elgin and Glen Fergus.
heading: Glen Elgin vs Glen Fergus — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Elgin, New South Wales and Glen Fergus, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Fergus has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Glen Elgin (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Elgin or Glen Fergus safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Elgin has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Glen Fergus scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Elgin scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Fergus scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Elgin or Glen Fergus?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Fergus has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
